content.query:
-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN address  IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_address,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_address2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address3 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_address3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_address4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address5 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_address5,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://baubaisadfsastg.dfs.core.windows.net/juror-etl/voters_postgresql/**',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
             AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address2))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address3)))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a3,

    SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
             AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address2))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address4)))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a4,

    SUM(CASE WHEN address3 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
             AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address3))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address4)))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a3_a4,

    SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NOT NULL AND address5 IS NOT NULL
             AND UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address4))) = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address5)))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a4_a5
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://baubaisadfsaprod.dfs.core.windows.net/juror-etl/voters_postgresql/**',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS rows;

SELECT *
    --COUNT_BIG(*) AS records_with_postcode_in_address4
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://baubaisadfsaprod.dfs.core.windows.net/juror-etl/voters_postgresql/**',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS rows
WHERE
    -- Strip spaces and check for postcode pattern length 5-7 chars
    LEN(REPLACE(UPPER(address4), ' ', '')) BETWEEN 5 AND 7
    AND REPLACE(UPPER(address4), ' ', '') LIKE '[A-Z][A-Z0-9]%[0-9][A-Z][A-Z]'
    AND REPLACE(UPPER(address4), ' ', '') NOT LIKE '%[^A-Z0-9]%';

    SELECT
    COUNT_BIG(*)                                                AS total_records,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)       AS address4_populated,
    SUM(CASE WHEN address4 = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)       AS address4_unknown
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://baubaisadfsaprod.dfs.core.windows.net/juror-etl/voters_postgresql/**',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS rows;
